title: Orchestration Ledger Entry (v1)
description: One append-only line per backend delegation, written by codex-companion.sh / cursor-companion.sh. Records only fixed, non-sensitive scalars — never prompt text, file contents, or secrets. See spec.md 'Orchestration Visibility Contract'.

ts.description: UTC timestamp when the delegation was recorded (ISO 8601, e.g. 2026-06-03T06:00:00Z).

backend.description: Which non-Claude backend was delegated to. Claude-side work is not written here; it is derived from agent-trace.jsonl at scorecard time.

subcommand.description: The companion subcommand (task, review, adversarial-review, setup, status, result, cancel).

write.description: Whether the delegation had write intent (e.g. task --write). Read-only delegations are false.

exit_code.description: Process exit code of the delegation. Null when the companion exec()s into the backend and cannot post-process (codex path).

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration in milliseconds. Null when not capturable (codex exec path).

session_id.description: Session that issued the delegation (CLAUDE_SESSION_ID, else session.json, else 'unknown'). Used to scope the scorecard to the current session.

counts.description: True only for real delegations (task / review / adversarial-review). False for status / setup / result / cancel so polling does not inflate the score.
